Props.text: Click any card to open a topic; use “Next” (bottom-right) or “Menu” (top-right) to navigate.
Tip: Ctrl+Alt+E toggles edit mode to customize; Ctrl+Alt+Q quits.
Lumen is a non-topmost overlay above your desktop icons and wallpaper: it sits below normal windows but above the desktop, never stealing focus and never blocking the taskbar reveal zone.
• Desktop mode (default): static display; widgets with a click action are interactive.
• Edit mode: drag, add, delete and tweak widgets. Toggle with Ctrl+Alt+E.
• A profile holds up to 99 pages; each page has its own grid, background and widgets.
• Page flip: Ctrl+Alt+← / → (the prev/next hotkeys are left as empty placeholders in source; bind a VK yourself).
• Multiple profiles can be saved, switched, exported or imported as a whole.
• Wallpaper layer / Grid layer / Canvas layer (where atoms live).
The target machine needs .NET 8 Desktop Runtime installed. The WinRT projection layer ships with the package — no extra install.
• Unzip the portable ZIP and run lumen.exe.
• Starts in desktop mode showing the active profile.
• Press Ctrl+Alt+E to enter edit mode.
• Right-click empty space → Add component (Text / Shape / Icon / Image / Progress / Gif / Container).
• Select a widget, then use the right property panel; the “External Variables” tab binds global variables gv().
• Press Ctrl+Alt+E again to return to desktop; changes save automatically.
• Right-click menu → Profiles… to create, switch, export or import.
• Shape: rectangle / ellipse + 14 procedural textures (frosted / glass / metal / neon…).
• Image: local picture with a placeholder when missing.
• Gif: play animated GIF (with speed control).
• Stack group: children laid out top-to-bottom.
• Overlap group: children stacked by their own anchors.
• Series group: children laid out left-to-right.
All three containers auto-size to their children (no fixed W/H); positioning uses anchors + XY offset.
• Each widget has an anchor (3×3 grid) and an XY offset that decide its position.
• E.g. top-right anchor: the widget's top-right corner aligns to the canvas top-right.
• Stack: children top-to-bottom; grows with content.
• Overlap: children placed by their own anchors, can overlap.
• Fill color, stroke (color / width / dash), shadow.
• Shapes support 14 procedural textures for glass/metal looks without bitmaps.
• Enter animation (with duration) and loop animation (with duration).
• Any widget can bind a click action — see “Interaction”.
Wrap an expression in $formula$ to use variables and functions for dynamic text or numbers.
• Text: + concatenates when either side is non-numeric.
• mu(round, x, n) rounds; mu(min/max/abs/len/...) math & text helpers.
• 0.1+0.2 shows 0.3: the result string auto-strips binary rounding noise.
• si(...): system performance counters (PDH), e.g. CPU / memory.
• Bind gv(name) via the property panel’s “External Variables” tab.
• Use the SetVar click action to write computed/read results into a variable.
• Each widget can hold several flows; actions chain others via RunFlow.
• Each topic page has “Next” (bottom-right); “Menu” (top-right) returns to cover.
• Or click the page dots in the taskbar / tray to flip pages.
• Appearance preset: applies grid + background to all pages only.
• Scene preset: replaces the current page entirely (from a page snapshot).
• A profile = all pages + per-page settings + variables + user presets.
• Switch / export / import as a whole (right-click → Profiles…).
• Four grid sizes + nine-grid anchor guides.
• Each page shows/hides its grid independently (edit-mode right-click).
• Per-page background: solid / wallpaper / reference another layer.
• A transparent background falls back to the first non-transparent page.
• Prev / Next page: empty placeholder in source; bind your own hotkey.
• Right-click → Settings: language, theme, default grid, etc.
• UI is Chinese / English; the manual switches with the UI language instantly.
• What to install? .NET 8 Desktop Runtime (WinRT layer is bundled).
• Where are configs? Default %LocalAppData%/Lumen/, changeable in Settings → Data location (migrate to any folder).
• Where are logs? Same root as data: <data location>/lumen.log; follows the data location / migration.
• Manual won’t open? Right-click tray → User Manual, or reinstall the built-in manual.
• Page limit? Up to 99 pages per profile.
图标 / 图像 / 动态图
Real system metrics, refreshed every second (PDH live-refresh fixed in v1.3.1).
Updates live while media plays (title/artist/progress). Buttons control playback.
Clock formulas refresh every second, following system locale.
Three containers auto-size to content; positioned by anchor + offset. (Illustration; drop real containers in edit mode.)
全局变量 gv(0) 当前值：
Click a button to write gv(0); the text above updates instantly (gv change triggers recompute). Interactive in desktop mode.
仅套用网格 + 背景到全部页面。
网格 / 背景整体换肤
整页替换当前页内容（来自页面快照）。
In your own profile, right-click → Presets to create and apply (manual has no bundled presets).
